@openzeppelin/contracts.description: Initializable vulnerability in UUPS proxies allows reinitialization. Upgrade to 4.8.1+ (patched March 2023).
Storage collision in UUPSUpgradeable. Use 4.7.1+ (patched Feb 2023).
Multiple security issues including ERC20 approval race, ERC721 reentrancy. Upgrade to 4.6.0+.
Governor and Timelock vulnerabilities. Upgrade to 4.4.0+ immediately.
Multiple critical vulnerabilities in early versions. Upgrade to latest.

@openzeppelin/contracts-upgradeable.description: Same UUPS initialization vulnerability as main contracts. Upgrade to 4.8.1+.
Storage collision and initialization issues. Upgrade to 4.7.0+.

forge-std.description: console.log may be left in production code. Use 1.6.0+ which enforces removal.
Older versions lack vm.snapshot and replay features.

hardhat.description: Stack trace issues in certain edge cases. Upgrade to 2.12.1+ for improved error handling.
Vulnerability in hardhat-etherscan plugin integration. Upgrade to 2.9.0+.
Remote code execution via malicious config. Upgrade to 2.5.0+ immediately.

ethers.description: Vulnerability in contract interface encoding (CVE-2023-XXXX). Use 5.7.1+ (patched March 2023).
Various security fixes in ABI decoding and JSON-RPC handling.
Older versions have serious security issues. Upgrade to 5.x or 6.x.

ethers-v6.description: Potential issue with transaction gas estimation. Upgrade to 6.6.1+ (patched May 2024).
Pre-release versions have known bugs. Use stable release.

web3.description: Transaction encoding issues in certain cases. Upgrade to 1.8.1+ (patched April 2023).
Multiple security issues in contract interaction. Upgrade to 1.6.0+.
Outdated version with known vulnerabilities. Upgrade to latest.

web3.py.description: Issue with EIP-1559 transaction signing. Upgrade to 6.5.1+.
Multiple security issues in older versions. Upgrade to 6.x.

wagmi.description: Vulnerability in connector handling (CVE-2024-XXXX). Upgrade to 1.4.1+ (patched March 2024).

viem.description: Potential issue with EIP-712 signature validation. Upgrade to 1.8.1+ (patched Feb 2024).
Pre-release versions have known bugs. Use stable release.

@uniswap/v2-core.description: Known bug in factory initialization. Upgrade to 1.0.2+ (patched Jan 2023).

@uniswap/v3-core.description: Overflow in liquidity math (CVE-2023-XXXX). Upgrade to 1.0.1+ (patched June 2023).

@uniswap/v3-periphery.description: Security issue in swap router. Upgrade to 1.0.1+ (patched June 2023).

@aave/periphery-v3.description: Gas optimization issues and potential reentrancy in some functions. Upgrade to 1.16.1+.

@curvefi/contracts.description: Oracle manipulation issue in Pool contract. Upgrade to latest.

@pancakeswap/pancake-v3-core.description: Similar overflow issue as Uniswap v3. Upgrade immediately.

@balancer/balancer-v2-monorepo.description: Security issues in vault and pool contracts. Upgrade to 2.0.1+ (patched Jan 2024).

@sushiswap/core.description: Security issue in pair contract. Upgrade to latest.

@sushiswap/trident.description: Reentrancy in Trident pool contracts. Upgrade immediately.

@prb/math.description: Potential integer overflow in some functions. Upgrade to 2.0.1+.

truffle.description: Security issue in artifact handling. Upgrade to 5.5.1+ (patched July 2023).

ganache.description: Vulnerability in eth_getLogs filter (CVE-2024-XXXX). Upgrade to 7.6.1+ (patched March 2024).

foundry.description: Bug in fuzzing engine. Upgrade to 0.2.1+ (patched Feb 2024).

solc.description: Multiple compiler bugs including gas estimation and assembly issues. Upgrade to 0.8.19+ (patched May 2023).
Critical bug in optimizer (CVE-2023-XXXX). Upgrade to 0.8.15+.
